svg.text: SVWTP basin longitudinal cross-section (60 ft × 420 ft × 11 ft)
Vertical scale exaggerated ~6:1 for clarity — modeling zones highlighted
Total mesh: ~150k–250k cells (2D) — runs in 5–15 min per steady-state case
Priority 1: Baffle type + placement at floc-sed transition (controls short-circuiting)
Priority 2: Launder configuration at basin exit (controls upwelling entrainment)
Priority 3: Combined optimization across 5–40 MGD operating range
